assertion_results.text: Step 1 extracts imprecise affected range from the Jira description — the description lacks a specific version threshold (Step 1 Data Extraction)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md line 12: 'Affected version range | "versions prior to the fix" (imprecise -- no exact threshold in Jira description)'; line 13: 'Fixed version | "see advisory" (imprecise -- no exact version in Jira description)'; lines 39-42 Data Quality Assessment: 'The Jira description provides **imprecise version information**: Affected versions: "versions prior to the fix" -- no numeric threshold; Fixed version: "see advisory" -- no specific version number'.

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries MITRE CVE API and extracts lessThan 0.4.8 as the fix threshold from the affected[].versions[] field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md line 13: 'Source: https://cveawg.mitre.org/api/cve/CVE-2026-48901'; lines 16-19: 'Product: h2, Vendor: hyperium, Affected range: versions less than (lessThan) **0.4.8** (semver), Status: affected'; line 21: 'The MITRE record provides a clear `lessThan` constraint: all versions of h2 below 0.4.8 are affected.'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries OSV.dev API and extracts fixed version 0.4.8 from the affected[].ranges[].events field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md line 23: 'Source: https://api.osv.dev/v1/vulns/CVE-2026-48901'; lines 28-31: 'Range type: SEMVER, Introduced: 0 (all versions from the beginning), Fixed: **0.4.8**'; line 33: 'The OSV.dev record confirms that the vulnerability was introduced from the start of the package and fixed in version 0.4.8.'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 cross-validation shows agreement between MITRE and OSV.dev — the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) is used as the authoritative value for Step 2.3
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md lines 45-48: 'Cross-Validation Result: **Agreement across external sources.** Both MITRE CVE API and OSV.dev report the same fix threshold: Affected: all h2 versions below 0.4.8, Fixed: h2 0.4.8'; lines 54-58: 'Enriched Fix Threshold: Affected range: h2 < 0.4.8, Fix threshold: **0.4.8**, Confidence: High (two independent external sources agree), Source precedence: External structured data (MITRE + OSV.dev) takes precedence over imprecise Jira description prose'; line 60: 'This enriched fix threshold (h2 >= 0.4.8 is not affected) will be used in Step 2.3 for version impact comparisons.'

assertion_results.text: Step 2.3 version impact comparison uses the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) from Step 1.5, not the imprecise Jira description data
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md lines 3-5: 'From Step 1.5 cross-validation: h2 versions **< 0.4.8** are affected. The fix threshold is **0.4.8** (confirmed by both MITRE CVE API and OSV.dev).'; line 13: version 2.2.0 with h2 0.4.5 marked YES affected with note '0.4.5 < 0.4.8'; line 14: version 2.2.1 with h2 0.4.8 marked NO with note 'ships fix version (0.4.8 >= 0.4.8)'. The threshold 0.4.8 is explicitly attributed to Step 1.5 cross-validation, not Jira description data.
